title.en: Not even close! 전혀 아니야! 완전 틀렸어!

description.en: When someone's guess is completely different from the truth! Practice expressing being far from the answer with 전혀 아니야 and 완전 틀렸어.
description.ko: 상대방의 추측이 사실과 완전히 다를 때! 전혀 아니야와 완전 틀렸어를 사용해 정답에서 멀리 떨어져 있음을 분명하게 말해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Inaccuracy. Guessing. Correction. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 오늘 기분이 되게 좋아 보이는데. 혹시 어제 복권이라도 당첨된 거예요?
content.translation: John. you look very happy today. Did you happen to win the lottery yesterday?

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's not even close. 전혀 아니예요. 그냥 아침에 마신 커피가 너무 맛있어서 그래요.
content.translation: Haha. That's not even close. It's not at all! It's just because the coffee I drank this morning was so delicious.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 저는 엄청난 일이 있는 줄 알았는데 제가 완전 틀렸네요!
content.translation: I thought something huge happened. but I was completely wrong! As expected.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 역시 존은 사소한 거에도 행복을 잘 느끼는 것 같아요.
content.translation: John. you seem to find happiness in small things.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 맞아요. 가끔은 맛있는 커피 한 잔이 복권보다 더 좋죠!
content.translation: Haha. Right. Sometimes a cup of delicious coffee is better than the lottery!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 전혀 아니야. I like how clear this sounds.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 상대방의 추측이 조금의 가능성도 없이 틀렸을 때 아주 강력하게 말할 수 있는 표현이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It is an expression you can say very strongly when someone's guess is wrong without even a slight possibility.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 전혀 아니야.
content.translation: Not at all.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 완전 틀렸어 라는 말은 상대방이 정답에서 한참 벗어났을 때 시원하게 정정해 주면서 쓰는 리액션이에요.
content.translation: And the phrase 'Wan-jeon teul-lyeot-eo' is a reaction used when someone is far off from the answer while coolly correcting them.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 완전 틀렸어.
content.translation: Completely wrong.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What about when someone is totally looking at the wrong thing.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그럴 땐 번지수 잘못 찾았어 라고 해보세요.
content.translation: In that case. try saying 'Beon-ji-su jal-mot chat-at-eo'.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 마치 엉뚱한 집 주소를 찾아간 것처럼 완전히 빗나갔다는 뜻이거든요.
content.translation: It means you missed it completely. like going to the wrong house address.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine you see me wearing a very fancy looking watch. and you try to guess how much it cost.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그 시계 진짜 비싸 보이네요. 한 백만 원 정도 하나요?
content.translation: Wow. John. that watch looks really expensive. Does it cost about a million won?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 전혀 아니야! 한 번 더 맞춰볼래요?
content.translation: Haha. Not even close! Do you want to try guessing again?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 음... 그럼 한 이백만 원? 명품 시계인가 보네요!
content.translation: Hmm. Then maybe two million won? It must be a luxury watch!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 완전 틀렸어요! 이거 사실 길거리에서 만 원 주고 산 장난감 시계예요.
content.translation: Haha. Completely wrong! This is actually a ten thousand won toy watch I bought on the street.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 정말요? 제가 진짜 번지수 잘못 찾았네요! 정말 비싸 보였거든요.
content.translation: Haha. Really? I really had the wrong idea! It looked truly expensive.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's the power of style. Mina!

content.speaker: John
content.text: It's always fun to see someone's reaction when their guess is completely off.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 정답에서 멀리 떨어진 엉뚱한 추측을 들었을 때 당황하지 말고 오늘 배운 표현들을 써보세요!
content.translation: Right. When you hear an absurd guess far from the answer. don't be flustered and use the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "not even close" reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 전혀 아니야! Not even close!
content.translation: Not even close!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 완전 틀렸어! You're completely wrong!
content.translation: You're completely wrong!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 번지수 잘못 찾았어! You've got the wrong idea!
content.translation: You've got the wrong idea!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 하나도 안 맞아! It doesn't match at all!
content.translation: It doesn't match at all!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 틀렸어! Wrong!
content.translation: Wrong!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 누군가 엉뚱한 추측을 하면 웃으면서 말해 보세요. 전혀 아니야!
content.translation: Everyone. if someone makes an absurd guess today. say it with a smile. Not at all!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 어제는 너무 바빠서 전혀 쉬지 못했어요. (I was so busy yesterday that I couldn't rest at all.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be wrong. To be incorrect
vocabulary.example: 이 문제는 계산이 틀렸네요. (The calculation for this problem is wrong.)
번지수를 잘못 찾으신 것 같아요. (I think you found the wrong address.)
복권 당첨을 축하드려요! (Congratulations on winning the lottery!)
제 추측이 맞았나요? (Was my guess correct?)

vocabulary.meaning: To be trivial. To be minor
vocabulary.example: 사소한 일로 다투지 마세요. (Don't fight over trivial things.)
